'''Hartzig''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and a military officer during the reign of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Biography==
Native to [[Almania]], he was an officer who served in [[Kueller]]'s forces on the moon of [[Pydyr]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Rebellion]]''
